## Question

State the reviewer or partner question.

## Review area

Choose the closest area:

- architecture
- protocol
- claim boundary
- evidence model
- diligence process
- business/contact routing
- public roadmap

## Public-safety check

Confirm the question can be answered without exposing private runtime mechanics, proof bundles, infrastructure configuration, keys, hashes, receipt material, or deployment commands.
